title: White Wood Filler Interior & Exterior 500g + Flexible 3" Filling Tool – Weather-Resistant, Quick-Drying Wood Putty for Cracks, Holes & Gaps – Paintable Outdoor & Indoor Wood Repair
features: WHITE WOOD FILLER 500G FOR INTERIOR & EXTERIOR USE: High-performance wood filler ideal for repairing cracks, holes, dents, and surface damage on doors, furniture, floors, skirting boards, and more.
INCLUDES FLEXIBLE 3" FILLING TOOL FOR EASY APPLICATION: Comes with a smooth, bendable 3-inch applicator to help you fill and spread with precision – perfect for DIY wood repair jobs.
QUICK-DRYING WOOD FILLER FOR FAST REPAIRS: Reduces downtime on projects with fast drying time; ideal for interior and exterior wood repairs where speed matters.
EASY TO SAND AND PAINTABLE FINISH: Sands down to a smooth surface and accepts paint, varnish, or wood stain for a clean, invisible repair that matches existing woodwork.
WOOD FILLER FOR CRACKS, HOLES, AND GAPS: Designed to fix small and large imperfections on softwoods and hardwoods – long-lasting, shrink-resistant, and weather-tough.
description: Repair wood surfaces with confidence using this high-quality White Wood Filler 500g , designed for interior and exterior wood repairs . Whether you're restoring old furniture, filling cracks in wooden floors, or fixing damaged door frames, this quick-drying wood filler gets the job done fast. Includes a flexible 3" filling tool for smooth and even application. The tool helps you apply the filler precisely, reducing mess and improving finish quality – perfect for DIYers and professionals alike. Key Features: 500g of ready-to-use white wood filler for all types of wood Quick-drying formula – ideal for fast project completion Paintable and stainable – blends seamlessly with natural or treated wood Perfect for cracks, holes, dents, and surface gaps Includes 3" flexible filling tool for precise application This versatile wood repair putty is a must-have for any toolbox. Use it indoors or outdoors to achieve professional results on softwood and hardwood surfaces.
